About this item

  • 16H Matte Liquid Lipstick: This liquid lipstick offers intense pigmentation and a matte finish that lasts up to 16 hours. Now available in 36 saturated shades for every skin tone and mood, including 15 new shades.
  • Saturated Ink Pigment + Thin Film Formula for 16 hours of flexible, flawless matte look with a single swipe
  • Resist 1,000 touches, No Touch-ups needed: Unleash bold, long-lasting color that stays put. Super Stay Matte Ink is food-resistant, smudge proof, transferproof and waterproof.
  • New Look, Same Iconic Formula: Super Stay Matte Ink’s new lightweight packaging reduces global plastic consumption by 228 tons.
  • Precise Application: Our unique arrow applicator allows you to achieve a bold, defined lip look with effortless precision.
› See more product details

Important information

Safety Information:

For external use only.

Ingredients:

INGREDIENTS: DIMETHICONE, TRIMETHYLSILOXYSILICATE, ISODODECANE, NYLON-611/DIMETHICONE COPOLYMER, DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER, C30-45 ALKYLDIMETHYLSILYL POLYPROPYLSILSESQUIOXANE, LAUROYL LYSINE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SILICA SILYLATE, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, DISODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, LIMONENE, SILICA, CALCIUM ALUMINUM BOROSILICATE, BENZYL BENZOATE, ALUMINA, SYNTHETIC FLUORPHLOGOPITE, MAGNESIUM SILICATE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, CITRONELLOL, TOCOPHEROL, TIN OXIDE, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, [+/- MAY CONTAIN / PEUT CONTENIR CI 15850 / RED 7, CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499 / IRON OXIDES, CI 77891 / TITANIUM DIOXIDE, MICA, CI 15850 / RED 6, CI 15985 / YELLOW 6 LAKE, CI 17200 / RED 33 LAKE, CI 19140 / YELLOW 5 LAKE, CI 42090 / BLUE 1 LAKE, CI 45380 / RED 22 LAKE, CI 45410 / RED 28 LAKE.

Directions:

HOW TO USE Step 1: Outline lips with precision tip applicator. Step 2: Fill lips in one bold swipe. Step 3: Let lips completely dry.

Product description

Super Stay Matte Ink Liquid Lipstick gives you a flawless matte finish in a range of super pigmented shades. Ink your lips in gorgeous, matte shades that are waterproof and last all day. Super Stay Matte Ink lipstick is now available in 36 stunning shades made for Indian skin tones that do not smudge or transfer and lasts for up to 16 hours!

From the manufacturer

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Sponsored

Customers say

Customers find the lipstick's color well-pigmented and consider it the best liquid matte lipstick, with amazing staying power and smudge resistance. The texture receives mixed feedback, with some praising its rich smooth feel while others dislike it, and customers disagree on whether it's worth the price. Customers disagree on whether it keeps lips moisturized.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

Select to learn more

1178 customers mention color, 846 positive, 332 negative1,178 customers mention "Color"846 positive332 negative
Customers like the lipstick's color, finding it well pigmented and nice, with one customer noting it's perfect for Indian skin tone.
"Beautiful shade .. I bought Founder shade and it’s amazing for every skin tone especially from medium to fair also it will look great on warm tones" Read more
"Nice colour. If you looking for Longlasting(Upto 12hrs) , Kissproof(Not Transferrable), Water Proof then this is the perfect choice...." Read more
"It's sticky ...highly pigmented I purchased seeker but this color is not worth it quality is ok ok I don't recommend this lipstick in this amount" Read more
"Amazing product ,nice shade but cant use it for daily use cause it is liqyid matte but good product" Read more
972 customers mention quality, 827 positive, 145 negative972 customers mention "Quality"827 positive145 negative
Customers find the lipstick to be of good quality, with one customer noting it's particularly suitable for daily use.
"It's a good product. Not a very poppy pink. Good pink for every day. Highly smudge proof. But a bit difficult to remove. Should use make up remover...." Read more
"Nice product. Though I received a different shade. But it's quality is amazing Maybelline is always my favourite brand" Read more
"...But this i don't feel this lipstick is a good quality . Very sticky online, gives me a feeling of i applied oil paint which we use to paint doors...." Read more
"Awesome Product.. Best liquid matte ever.. i truely love this Product.. & its highly recommended.. i have stop searching liquid matte.. 👌👌👌👌superb..." Read more
920 customers mention longevity, 827 positive, 93 negative920 customers mention "Longevity"827 positive93 negative
Customers praise the lipstick's staying power, with one mentioning it remains intact even after eating.
"It is long lasting light weight but doesn't remove easily with makeup remover also.its very difficult to remove it.it won't even come out for 2 days." Read more
"Lasting and look wise this lipstick is awesome..but removal wise it's awful.its almost impossible to remove it by using maybelline by phase make up..." Read more
"...I am totally loving this liquid lipcolor, as the company says "SUPER STAY" this is actually a very long stay lipstick 💄 just a wow product 👍👍👍👍👍👌👌👌..." Read more
"...Otherwise it's good, the formulation, texture,longevity. I have used them before in the shade pioneer and delicate. This time i chose versatile...." Read more
392 customers mention smudge resistance, 297 positive, 95 negative392 customers mention "Smudge resistance"297 positive95 negative
Customers praise the lipstick's smudge resistance, noting that it stays on for up to 16 hours and doesn't leave marks on pillows or masks.
"It's smudge proof and it's stay very long transfer proof and have a unique fragrance I love this lipstick I brought it on diwali sale thank you Amazon" Read more
"...And yes, this lipstick is smudge-proof -- even if you try to smudge it with cloth, it will leave the stain on your lips. Transfer-proof too...." Read more
"...Its wand was intact. Liquid lipstick was not dried at all. Smudgeproof, long lasting, waterproof, and most important perfect casual nude brown shade...." Read more
"Poineer: It's not proper red, it's under maroon tone. It's not smudge proof, I just did a little rub on my hand Swatch, it faded away...." Read more
235 customers mention value for money, 148 positive, 87 negative235 customers mention "Value for money"148 positive87 negative
Customers have mixed opinions about the lipstick's value for money, with some finding it worth the price and a terrific purchase, while others consider it not worth the money and a complete waste of money.
"...Stay more than 24 hour love with this shade total value for money very nice for party or wedding easy to apply Smudge free" Read more
"Waste of money as the shade I wanted turned out to be very different from what was ordered. See skin color and swatch...." Read more
"...Compared to many other products this does stand out and is worth the money. The quantity is absolutely great, long lasting, great quality...." Read more
"...Longer stay and perfect matt look. Go ahead buying, its all worth it..." Read more
205 customers mention texture, 134 positive, 71 negative205 customers mention "Texture"134 positive71 negative
Customers have mixed opinions about the texture of the lipstick, with some praising its rich smooth and creamy feel, while others find it feels heavy on their lips.
"...Otherwise it's good, the formulation, texture,longevity. I have used them before in the shade pioneer and delicate. This time i chose versatile...." Read more
"Its not smooth... i can feel dryness and itchiness after its application.. money waste... better to buy from shop." Read more
"Exhilarator is a gorgeous neutral ruby red—bold yet wearable. Smooth, pigmented, super comfortable, and perfect for parties and glam makeup!" Read more
"Must buy product..long lasting and it has creamy texture and it feels creamy for 30 mins or until it drys completely.. go for it this shade suits..." Read more
203 customers mention dryness, 70 positive, 133 negative203 customers mention "Dryness"70 positive133 negative
Customers have mixed experiences with the lipstick's moisture level, with some finding it keeps lips moisturized while others report that it becomes very dry.
"Very dry, turns sticky and cakey in few seconds. Highly pigmented and unremovable for almost 30 hours...." Read more
"Very nice lipstick spot on pigmentation long lasting and non drying.. definitely transfer proof value for money" Read more
"This lipstick is dry and vacant inside doesn't use I already complain about thi and also share photo" Read more
"...And it makes lips dry. So better apply gloss over it . Very light shade than what shown in the picture. Overall not worthy product." Read more
413 customers mention removability, 122 positive, 291 negative413 customers mention "Removability"122 positive291 negative
Customers have mixed experiences with the lipstick's removability, with some reporting that it comes off easily while others find it really hard to remove.
"Definitely smudge proof and also lasts very long but not easy to remove you will need to apply moisturizer and remove it.. It's really hard to remove..." Read more
"...Duplicate product. Got infection over my entire mouth area. Hard to remove. It was not going off even with soap water. Tried with moisturizer also...." Read more
"Easy to remove only if we are using coconut oil or Makeup remover. All in all its an amazing shade to flaunt" Read more
"I bought globe trotter...color is different...sticky, thick heavy and does t look good at all as opposed to the swatches shown... totally regret..." Read more

5 out of 5 stars
Value for money
The colour, quantity is very Good. Lipstick texture is very smooth, very easy to apply, it's good for daily use. And trust me guys this lipstick stay 9 hours. I mean.. mujhe ise nikaalne ke liye Vaseline ka use karna pada. It and light Rose colour and I always wear this on my special occasions.

Product Summary: Maybelline New York Superstay Matte Ink Liquid Lipstick - 16H Longwear Matte | Revolutionary, 5ml

From Maybelline

4.2 out of 5 stars, 51,485 ratings

Customer reviews

50+ bought in past month

Price

One-time purchase: ₹426.93 43% Savings

List Price: ₹749.00

Inclusive of all taxes

Purchasing options

Other sellers

Other sellers

About this Item

  • 16H Matte Liquid Lipstick: This liquid lipstick offers intense pigmentation and a matte finish that lasts up to 16 hours. Now available in 36 saturated shades for every skin tone and mood, including 15 new shades.
  • Saturated Ink Pigment + Thin Film Formula for 16 hours of flexible, flawless matte look with a single swipe
  • Resist 1,000 touches, No Touch-ups needed: Unleash bold, long-lasting color that stays put. Super Stay Matte Ink is food-resistant, smudge proof, transferproof and waterproof.
  • New Look, Same Iconic Formula: Super Stay Matte Ink’s new lightweight packaging reduces global plastic consumption by 228 tons.
  • Precise Application: Our unique arrow applicator allows you to achieve a bold, defined lip look with effortless precision.

Product description

Super Stay Matte Ink Liquid Lipstick gives you a flawless matte finish in a range of super pigmented shades. Ink your lips in gorgeous, matte shades that are waterproof and last all day. Super Stay Matte Ink lipstick is now available in 36 stunning shades made for Indian skin tones that do not smudge or transfer and lasts for up to 16 hours!

Important Information

Safety Information:

For external use only.

Ingredients:

INGREDIENTS: DIMETHICONE, TRIMETHYLSILOXYSILICATE, ISODODECANE, NYLON-611/DIMETHICONE COPOLYMER, DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER, C30-45 ALKYLDIMETHYLSILYL POLYPROPYLSILSESQUIOXANE, LAUROYL LYSINE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SILICA SILYLATE, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, DISODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, LIMONENE, SILICA, CALCIUM ALUMINUM BOROSILICATE, BENZYL BENZOATE, ALUMINA, SYNTHETIC FLUORPHLOGOPITE, MAGNESIUM SILICATE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, CITRONELLOL, TOCOPHEROL, TIN OXIDE, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, [+/- MAY CONTAIN / PEUT CONTENIR CI 15850 / RED 7, CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499 / IRON OXIDES, CI 77891 / TITANIUM DIOXIDE, MICA, CI 15850 / RED 6, CI 15985 / YELLOW 6 LAKE, CI 17200 / RED 33 LAKE, CI 19140 / YELLOW 5 LAKE, CI 42090 / BLUE 1 LAKE, CI 45380 / RED 22 LAKE, CI 45410 / RED 28 LAKE.

Directions:

HOW TO USE Step 1: Outline lips with precision tip applicator. Step 2: Fill lips in one bold swipe. Step 3: Let lips completely dry.
